name: HMS ML 464 (ML 464)
events: 15 Feb 1943 HrMs O 9 (Lt.Cdr. J.F. Drijfhout Van Hooff, RNN) shifted from the Firth of Forth to Dundee. She was escorted by HMS ML 464 (T/Lt. R.H. Davison, RNVR). (1)
6 Mar 1943 HMS Shakespeare (Lt. M.F.R. Ainslie, DSC, RN) departed Sheerness for Portsmouth. She was escorted by HMS ML 464. Later escort duties were taken over by HMS ML 535. (2)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
